notes: Default gravity deck for the Chariot / midnight bus. Road beats (a deer, a pothole, the wipers click on), passenger beats (someone pulls the cord, a sleeping passenger snores), CB beats (channel 17 has chatter).

deck.title: a deer
deck.flavor: the headlights catch a deer that doesn't move.

deck.title: the wipers click on
deck.flavor: the wipers move once. you didn't ask. the rain is gentle.

deck.title: a passenger pulls the cord
deck.flavor: somebody mid-aisle wants the next stop.

deck.title: the pothole
deck.flavor: the front wheels find the pothole. things rattle.

deck.title: channel 17
deck.flavor: the CB has news of weather ahead.

deck.title: the back row settles
deck.flavor: someone in the back row has stopped snoring.

deck.title: a late boarder
deck.flavor: the bus stops; somebody runs up to the door at the last second.

deck.title: the radio clears
deck.flavor: the dashboard radio finds a station. an oldies station. a song you used to know.

deck.title: fuel warning light
deck.flavor: the orange light on the dashboard. you noticed it three minutes ago.

deck.title: a lost passenger
deck.flavor: someone has been on the bus for fifteen stops and just realized.

deck.title: the bus steadies
deck.flavor: the pavement smooths out. the route is the route.

deck.title: a bumpy stretch
deck.flavor: twenty-six miles of bad road, the way it's been every night.

deck.title: an unscheduled stop
deck.flavor: the brake lights of the truck ahead of you. you brake. you pull over.

deck.title: the long quiet road
deck.flavor: twenty minutes of road with no signs, no oncoming, no cb.

deck.title: destination in sight
deck.flavor: the next-town depot lights on the horizon.
